name: growth-erp
description: Growth ERP - SaaS de gestao e crescimento para PME angolanas.

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @growth/shared build && pnpm --filter @growth/ui build && pnpm --parallel --filter @growth/api --filter @growth/web dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @growth/shared build && pnpm --filter @growth/ui build && pnpm --filter @growth/api build && pnpm --filter @growth/web build
